My car is a 2018 Kia Rio that has a clean history and has never been in an accident. Recently my airbag light came on and I had a diagnostic run that showed a B1448 code indicating an OCS mat defect in the passenger seat. The 2015-2018 Kia Sedona models also had the same problem

narrative.headline: What 2018 Kia Rio owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 27 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (52% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
